coursesNote: Partial — two courses unknown ('Old Carolina, Old South, ??, ??, Shipyard').
championNote: From Jimmy's history (fact per Ryan): first-ever HHGA championship. No scores survive.
story: Jimmy outlasts Joe and Johnny at Shipyard — the round is lost for Joe when a single is put in the final threesome, Johnny fades early, and Jimmy cruises to the first ever HHGA championship. First year as guests at Pappy's condo: the condo is cool, the hot tub is warm. Van from Johnny's to Philly, fly to Savannah. The start of it all — the rest is history.
